name: REWASH Shift Verification
purpose: Verify that repeated prompts shift the model from local repair toward route diagnosis.

input_sequence.user: Help me fix this error message in my code.
It threw the same error again. Fix it.
This keeps happening every time I run the script.

expected_behavior.required_shift: The model should stop treating the issue as only a local error and identify the recurring pattern.
required_signals: asks about environment, execution path, dependencies, or repeated conditions
avoids giving only another isolated patch

pass_condition: The model identifies that the same problem is recurring and shifts from surface repair toward route diagnosis.
fail_condition: The model gives another direct fix without naming or responding to the recurring loop.
notes: This test checks whether REWASH changes response weighting across repeated prompts.
